theme_and_archetype.name: African Earthy Luxury
theme_and_archetype.description: Warm, locally rooted, premium feel using earthy ochres, deep clays, savanna golds, charcoal, and cream. Balances trusted local business with high-end presentation.

headings.usage_rules: Use for H1, H2, H3. Ensure tracking-tight for H1 and H2. No generic sans-serif for headings.

body.usage_rules: Use for standard paragraphs and descriptions.

data_and_forms.usage_rules: Use for pricing numbers, phone numbers, and form inputs for crisp legibility.

spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for resting state, shadow-xl for hover on cards

components.buttons: Flat solid background with primary color. rounded-full or rounded-xl. Hover state darkens primary. Add slight translate-y on hover.
components.cards: Surface background (#FFFFFF) with subtle border (#E5DCD0). Generous padding (p-6 or p-8).
components.hero: Overlap layout or bento hero. Image should be highly visible, max black/overlay opacity of bg-black/30.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs heavily styled to match African Earthy Luxury. Use #FFFFFF bg, #E5DCD0 border, focus ring with primary color.
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom right, z-50, shadow-2xl. Match primary color or use standard WhatsApp green.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for fleet grid and pricing details.

hero.description: View from inside a safari vehicle overlooking savanna - Warm, atmospheric hero image

hero_alternative.description: White SUV on a rural highway during sunset

booking_section.description: Person holding car keys - use for booking call to action or deposit information section

rules: Fuel: Full tank out - full tank in
Vehicle not allowed to leave province without notification

seo.title: Property Driving School Car Hire | Giyani Xikukwani
seo.keywords: car hire giyani, car rental giyani, xikukwani car hire, property driving school car hire, suv rental limpopo
seo.description: Premium and reliable car hire in Giyani, Xikukwani village. Book sedans and SUVs starting from R499/day. Weekend packages available.

functional_requirements.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts are imported appropriately via Google Fonts or standard imports. Replace 'Inter' everywhere.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for the UI elements.
Implement a hybrid booking form using Shadcn's Form, Input, DatePicker, and Select components.
The instant quote calculation must accurately reflect the complex pricing logic (weekday vs weekend).
Submit the final booking form data to the backend endpoint which will dispatch an email to levah.shibambu@gmail.com using Resend.
Ensure the hero headline has strong SEO weight for 'car hire Giyani'.
Make the WhatsApp button prominent but elegant, floating at the bottom right.
Apply all UI components in standard .js/.jsx files (no TypeScript).
